name: I Was There
overview: An immersive trip back in time, placing host Theo Wilson—the grandson of a Tuskegee Airman with a passion for history—at the center of some of the world’s most impactful events, to deconstruct how they truly unfolded.

trailers.title: I Was There | New 12 Part Series Premieres February 28th At 10/9c | HISTORY
